blocks.name: output5
blocks.comment: Output config

inputs.value:
### Overrides

These overrides may have a large impact on how this automation runs, ensure these are configured correctly.

| Param | Value |
|------------------------|---------------------------|
| API key expiration override | {if: {$.setMaxApiKey} notEmpty , '*Will set all tenants to { $.setMaxApiKey }*', 'Current tenant settings will be used'} |
| Skip to tenant number | {$.skipToTenantNumber} |
| Recreate connections | {if: {$.recreateConnections} = 1, '*All REST connections & API keys being recreated*', 'No changes made to existing REST connections or API keys'} |
| Replace all apps | {if: {$.replaceAllApps} = 1, '*All apps being fully replaced due to override*', 'Replacing outdated apps only'} |
| Run only on tenant | {if: {$.runOnTenant} empty , '<all tenants>', $.runOnTenant} |

### Base configuration

| Param | Value |
|------------------------|---------------------------|
| Automatic tenant cleanup | {if: { $.autoTenantCleanup } = 1, '*Auto delete missing tenant data*', 'No'} |
| Create a reload schedule for apps when creating or updating | {$.createSchedule} |
| Check for new versions | { $.checkVersions } |
| Glossary name | {$.glossaryName} |
| Manifest URL | {$.manifestUrl} |
| Next run delay (seconds) | {$.nextRunDelaySeconds} |
| Parent tenant | {$.parentTenant} |
| Reload apps after creating or updating | {$.doReload} |
| REST connector name | {$.restConnectorName} |
| Run mode | {$.runMode} |
| Shared space base name | {$.sharedSpaceName} |
| Subscription type | {$.subscriptionType} |
| Tenant count | {count: {$.tenantList}}|
| Version | {$.qcmamtVersion} |

blocks.name: output12
blocks.comment: README: Check the variables below, perform a manual run to successfully deploy all apps the first time, and then schedule this automation to run weekly or monthly.

inputs.value:
## Qlik Cloud multi-tenant monitoring app deployer

The Qlik Cloud multi-tenant monitoring app deployer automates the installation and update of the monitoring apps from the [Qlik Cloud monitoring apps repository](https://github.com/qlik-oss/qlik-cloud-monitoring-apps) onto one or many tenants. Check the variables below, then run manually, or schedule for when you'd like your apps updated. For more information please refer to the [documentation](https://github.com/qlik-oss/qlik-cloud-monitoring-apps/blob/main/automations/multipleTenantInstaller.md).

**Some apps require specific license entitlements and will not be installed if these criteria are not met.**

blocks.name: reloadScheduleHour
blocks.comment: Set to the hour of the day (UTC) when the apps should start to reload. Will create a schedule for each app at this time, with an optional offset per tenant to help stagger load.

blocks.name: customCode2
blocks.comment: Generate the timing for the task.

inputs.value:
import json

# Get inputs
startHour = inputs['startHour']
iteration = inputs['iteration']
isParent = inputs['isParent']
totalTenants = inputs['totalTenants']

# Configuration
MINUTE_INCREMENT = 0  # Minutes between each deployment

# Parse start hour (handle both string and int)
start_hour = int(startHour) if isinstance(startHour, str) else startHour

if isParent == "parent":
    # For parent apps, calculate total minutes for all regular iterations
    # then add 10 minutes buffer
    total_minutes = (totalTenants * MINUTE_INCREMENT) + 10
else:
    # For regular apps, calculate based on iteration
    total_minutes = iteration * MINUTE_INCREMENT

# Calculate final hour and minute
total_hours = total_minutes // 60
final_minute = total_minutes % 60
final_hour = (start_hour + total_hours) % 24

# Format output
output = f"BYHOUR={final_hour:02d};BYMINUTE={final_minute:02d}"

# Return as JSON
print(json.dumps(output))

blocks.name: customCode3
blocks.comment: Sort the list of tenants.

inputs.value:
import json

tenantList = inputs.get('tenantList')

# Handle None or empty input
if not tenantList:
    print(json.dumps([]))
else:
    # Separate parent and non-parent items
    parent_items = [x for x in tenantList if 'parent' in x.get('tags', [])]
    non_parent_items = [x for x in tenantList if 'parent' not in x.get('tags', [])]
    
    # Sort non-parent items by createdAt descending (newest first)
    non_parent_sorted = sorted(
        non_parent_items,
        key=lambda item: item.get('createdAt', ''),
        reverse=True
    )
    
    # Combine: non-parent items first (newest to oldest), then parent items
    sorted_list = non_parent_sorted + parent_items
    
    print(json.dumps(sorted_list))
